message:
fix(amp): extract workspace from env.initial.trees[].uri and timestamps from "created" field

The Amp connector was failing to extract workspace paths (stored at
env.initial.trees[].uri) and conversation timestamps (stored as
millisecond epoch in the "created" field). This caused --workspace
and --days filtering to be non-functional for Amp sessions.

Closes Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#100

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
